constructs: covariance, object representation, dimension diagnosticity, feature correlation
claim: Feature binding in statistical learning is determined by correlation structure rather than fixed object categories; high covariance drives object-based learning, low covariance drives feature-based learning.

constructs: context strength, item strength, spacing, context mismatch
claim: Directed forgetting is not strength-invariant; forgetting magnitude increases for strong items only when strength stems from context-multiplying operations like spacing, not from increased processing depth or time.

constructs: abstract representation, automaticity, notation independence, magnitude activation
claim: Numerical information across different notations is automatically translated to common magnitude representation, demonstrating notation-independent abstract coding.

phenomenon: recollection-based recognition with dual retrieval routes
constructs: familiarity, recollection, context-to-item retrieval, item-to-context retrieval, serial position effects
claim: Recognition combines familiarity and recollection through two bidirectional retrieval routes; intrusion errors reflect recollection strength, producing serial position curves parallel to positive probes.

phenomenon: illusory source recollections from stereotype activation
constructs: expectation-consistent illusory memory, constructive recollection, gist-trace redintegration, false remembering
claim: Stereotype activation at retrieval constructs illusory source recollections; false memories accompany high confidence and remember judgments, not guessing, demonstrating recollection is constructed from both trace and expectations.

phenomenon: time-based resource sharing in task switching
constructs: task switching cost, attention occupation, maintenance decay, working memory capacity
claim: Task switching impairs working memory maintenance proportional to its attentional time cost; load-independent switch cost reflects time-based resource sharing where any attention-consuming activity degrades memory trace refreshment.
